changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: UPDATE plugin_configuration SET properties = jsonb_set(to_jsonb(plugin_configuration.properties) - 'objectManagementId', '{verzoekProperties}', new_verzoek_properties) FROM ( SELECT a.plugin_configuration_id, jsonb_agg(new_p) new_verzoek_properties FROM LATERAL ( SELECT c.plugin_configuration_id, jsonb_set( to_jsonb(jsonb_array_elements(jsonb_extract_path(to_jsonb(c.properties), 'verzoekProperties'))), '{objectManagementId}', jsonb_extract_path(to_jsonb(c.properties), 'objectManagementId'), true ) AS new_p FROM plugin_configuration c WHERE c.plugin_definition_key = 'verzoek' ) AS a GROUP BY a.plugin_configuration_id ) AS b WHERE plugin_configuration.plugin_configuration_id = b.plugin_configuration_id

changeSet.author: Ritense
changeSet.sql: UPDATE plugin_configuration as d INNER JOIN ( SELECT c.plugin_configuration_id, json_remove(json_replace(c.properties, '$.verzoekProperties', json_arrayagg(json_insert(a.verzoek_property, '$.objectManagementId', json_extract(c.properties, '$.objectManagementId')))), '$.objectManagementId') as new_verzoek_properties FROM plugin_configuration c, json_table(c.properties, '$.verzoekProperties[*]' columns( verzoek_property JSON PATH '$' ) ) AS a GROUP BY c.plugin_configuration_id ) AS b ON d.plugin_configuration_id = b.plugin_configuration_id SET d.properties = b.new_verzoek_properties
